Title: Admin SPA — Login and Dashboard Load
Preconditions: Fresh browser session, {{BACK_URL}} accessible, valid admin credentials available
Assertions:
[BLADE] main navigation sidebar visible with module icons
[DOM] user avatar or username shown in top header
[DOM] platform version or module tiles visible on dashboard
[STATE] no redirect loop back to login page
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/platform/security/currentuser returns 200 with authenticated user data
[CONSOLE] no Angular errors or uncaught exceptions during SPA bootstrap
Failure_Signals: Login form does not appear (blank page or spinner >10s), 401/403 on currentuser API, infinite redirect loop to login, Angular bootstrap exception in console

Title: OAuth2 Token Endpoint — Admin Credentials
Preconditions: {{BACK_URL}} accessible, admin credentials in {{ADMIN}} / {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 200 OK
[BODY] response contains access_token field (non-empty string)
[BODY] token_type = 'Bearer'
[BODY] expires_in > 0
[BODY] refresh_token present
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] use returned Bearer token in Authorization header: GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/platform/security/currentuser → 200 with admin user data
[BODY] currentuser response shows roles including 'Administrator'
Failure_Signals: HTTP 400 or 401 on token endpoint, access_token absent in response, token does not authenticate subsequent API calls, missing scope=offline_access causes rejection

Title: Platform Health Endpoint — Modules and Services
Preconditions: Admin credentials obtained (BSM-002), {{BACK_URL}}/health accessible
Steps:
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/health
[SETUP] Authorization: Bearer {{bearer_token}}
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 200 OK
[BODY] response JSON contains Modules health status
[BODY] Cache health entry present
[BODY] Redis health entry present
[BODY] SQL Server health entry present
[BODY] overall health status is 'Healthy' (no 'Unhealthy' or 'Degraded' entries)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/platform/modules returns 200 with non-empty module list
[BODY] modules array contains items with 'id' and 'version' fields
Failure_Signals: Health endpoint returns 503 or 500, any subsystem marked 'Unhealthy' (Redis down, SQL Server unreachable), modules API returns empty array, health endpoint requires auth but token fails

Title: Platform Modules API — Installed Modules List
Preconditions: Admin Bearer token obtained (BSM-002)
Steps:
[HTTP] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/platform/modules
[SETUP] Authorization: Bearer {{bearer_token}}
Assertions:
[STATUS] HTTP 200 OK
[BODY] response is a JSON array with at least 10 items
[BODY] each module entry has 'id', 'version', 'state' fields
[BODY] core modules present: VirtoCommerce.Catalog, VirtoCommerce.Orders, VirtoCommerce.Customer, VirtoCommerce.Pricing, VirtoCommerce.Inventory, VirtoCommerce.Marketing
[BODY] all listed modules show state = 'Installed' (no 'Error' or 'Missing' state)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ADMIN] navigate to {{BACK_URL}}/ui#/modules blade — module list matches API response count
[BLADE] no module shows a red error indicator in the Admin blade
Failure_Signals: 403 Forbidden (token lacks permissions), empty module array (platform failure), any core module absent, state = 'Error' for any core module, count mismatch between API and Admin blade by >2

Preconditions: Admin logged in to {{BACK_URL}} (BSM-001 passed)
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui#/catalog
[WAIT] Catalog blade loads (catalog list visible)
[ASSERT] at least one catalog item visible in the grid
Assertions:
[BLADE] Catalog blade title shown (e.g., 'Catalogs')
[GRID] catalog grid renders with columns (Name, Type, etc.)
[GRID] at least 1 catalog row visible
[DOM] toolbar buttons present: 'Add', 'Delete' (or equivalent)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] GET {{BACK_URL}}/api/catalog/catalogs → 200 with non-empty 'catalogs' array
[BODY] API catalog count matches grid row count (±1 for pagination)
Failure_Signals: Catalog blade fails to open (404 route, spinner stuck >15s), grid empty when catalogs should exist, API returns 500, catalog count mismatch between API and UI
References: Suite 051 (Catalog Admin Products), Suite 053 (Catalog Admin Categories)

Title: GraphQL xAPI — Schema Introspection
Preconditions: Admin logged in to {{BACK_URL}} (session cookie available)
Steps:
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL interface loaded (query editor visible)
[ACT] clear any existing query in the editor
[ACT] type introspection query: { __schema { types { name } } }
[ACT] click 'Execute Query' (play button)
[WAIT] response panel populates
Assertions:
[DOM] GraphiQL editor loads without error
[ERRORS] response data panel shows no errors[] array
[DATA] __schema.types array present with at least 20 type entries
[DATA] core type names present: 'Query', 'Product', 'CartType', 'CustomerOrderType'
Cross_Layer_Checks: [API] introspection also succeeds via: POST {{BACK_URL}}/graphql with Authorization: Bearer {{bearer_token}} and body {"query": "{__schema{types{name}}}"} → 200 with no errors
Failure_Signals: GraphiQL page fails to load (404, Angular crash), introspection returns errors[] (introspection disabled), types array empty, key types absent (schema corrupt or xAPI module not loaded)
